name: impeccable
tagline: Multi-command frontend design/UX skill (craft, audit, polish, critique, etc.) with strict anti-AI-slop and accessibility rules.
verdict: Well-structured, versioned, context-economical skill: compact SKILL.md, concrete numeric design rules (contrast ratios, letter-spacing, radius limits), explicit negative triggers and failure fallbacks. Two gaps: the frontmatter description is a multi-hundred-word wall that should be terser, and the mandatory first step runs a Node.js script with no stated.

highlights.summary: Top-level output described qualitatively ("beautiful, responsive, fast, precise, bug-free, on brand") without a concrete deliverable shape; actual contract deferred to per-command reference files not
Description is a single sprawling multi-hundred-word paragraph of feature/verb lists, far beyond the 1-5 sentence guideline.
Step 1 mandates running `node .agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/context.mjs` with no Node.js requirement stated or availability check.
